title: Drivers License
why_this_song: Drivers License by Olivia Rodrigo (2021) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "'Cause you were so excited for me"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "And I know we weren't perfect"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "To finally drive up to your house"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "But today, I drove through the suburbs"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Yeah, today I drove through the suburbs
'Cause how could I ever love someone else?
And I know we weren't perfect
But I've never felt this way for no one
Yeah, today I drove through the suburbs
And pictured I was driving home to you
And I know we weren't perfect
But I've never felt this way for no one, oh

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "cause" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I got my driver's license last week
She's so much older than me
Yeah, today I drove through the suburbs

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Drivers License", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Drivers License", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Drivers License" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Drivers License" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Drivers License" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Drivers License", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
